files.patch:
@@ -50,7 +50,8 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           mkdir -p dist
           cp .build/release/imsg dist/imsg
-          (cd dist && zip -r imsg-macos.zip imsg)
+          cp -R .build/release/imsg_imsg.bundle dist/imsg_imsg.bundle
+          (cd dist && zip -r imsg-macos.zip imsg imsg_imsg.bundle)
 
       - name: Publish release assets
         uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2

@@ -2,6 +2,9 @@
 
 ## Unreleased
 
+## 0.2.2 - 2025-12-28
+- fix: include SwiftPM resource bundle in release + build outputs
+
 ## 0.2.1 - 2025-12-28
 - fix: embed CLI version in resources for `--version` output
 - docs: release checklist now includes version file update

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "imsg",
-  "version": "0.2.1",
+  "version": "0.2.2",
   "private": true,
   "scripts": {
     "deps:patch": "swift package resolve && scripts/patch-deps.sh",
@@ -9,6 +9,6 @@
     "format": "swift format --in-place --recursive Sources Tests",
     "lint": "swift format lint --recursive Sources Tests && swiftlint",
     "test": "pnpm -s deps:patch && swift test",
-    "build": "pnpm -s deps:patch && mkdir -p bin && swift build -c release --product imsg && cp .build/release/imsg bin/imsg"
+    "build": "pnpm -s deps:patch && mkdir -p bin && swift build -c release --product imsg && cp .build/release/imsg bin/imsg && cp -R .build/release/imsg_imsg.bundle bin/imsg_imsg.bundle"
   }
 }
